posts.author: Bashyam_Gomatam
posts.community: Hi-Green Carbon Ltd – Play on Renewable energy endeavoring wealth from waste
posts.text: Good evening VP founders and approvers, I just got approved on valuepickr, many thanks. I’ve been closely following fellow members’ very helpful posts and have been an beneficiary one or the other way. To all expert members, I had a question on Hi Green. I see a tax demand for FY 2013-2014 4.11 cr approx and I see that the company has filed an appeal against. In one of the notes Sep 2025, the company said they are neither considering this as contingent liability or provisioning for it. Per IT laws, I see that this must be treated as contingent liability. Does it concern you? Also, the tax dema…
